overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending from a narrow stairwell into the dense, neon-lit streets of Night City. The character navigates through hazy, dystopian urban environments with towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and heavy Japanese-inspired signage while pedestrians and vehicles populate the smoggy streets at dusk.

events.description: begins ascending the concrete staircase from ground level
reaches top of stairs and exits into open urban street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs steadily, following the rusted railing upward toward the street level

entered.detail: illuminated blue neon sign depicting a noodle bowl above a food stand
narrow weathered concrete stairs with metal railings ascending between building walls
pile of blue plastic garbage bags accumulated against the wall
large industrial AC units mounted on the building exterior
red painted metal handrail showing signs of rust and wear

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed stairwell with concrete walls and a blue neon noodle sign visible. The character ascends the stairs steadily, passing industrial air conditioning units and rusted railings, with artificial lighting illuminating the confined space. The ascent ends as the character approaches the top where pink neon signs become visible against the hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with hotel and commercial buildings

events.description: crosses the road alongside other pedestrians while a teal van waits at the intersection
transitions from walking to jogging briefly while crossing the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and navigating across the busy street with other pedestrians, passing a waiting van

notable_agents.action: teal delivery van stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: large vertical pink neon sign reading HOTEL in english letters
tall cyberpunk structure with multiple levels, air conditioning units, and neon advertisements
boxy teal-colored commercial van with headlights on
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on dark asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a wide hazy intersection dominated by a large pink neon hotel sign. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while a teal van waits at the light. The environment shifts from enclosed to open, revealing towering mixed-use buildings covered in wiring and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with graffiti walls

events.description: moves from open intersection to covered sidewalk beneath elevated transit track

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered concrete walls

entered.detail: massive concrete highway or monorail structure running overhead with support pillars
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large circular neon sign for Kiroshi Optics with japanese text
rusted metal barrier separating sidewalk from lower level

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk sheltered beneath an elevated highway structure, with graffiti-covered concrete walls on the right and the road on the left. The Kiroshi Optics billboard becomes visible in the distance. The space feels semi-enclosed compared to the open intersection, with the overhead structure creating a canopy effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corner with vending machines and street signage

events.description: turns left at the Moore Street intersection corner
pauses at corner as vehicles pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: navigating through street corners, turning at Moore Street and weaving through moderate pedestrian traffic near storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading Moore mounted on a pole
rounded corner building with red facade and multiple windows
illuminated blue vending machine with glowing interface
large digital screen displaying animated samurai imagery

segments.scene_description: The character turns at the Moore Street corner, passing a blue vending machine and a red corner building with a large digital samurai billboard. The area features moderate pedestrian activity and various storefronts with neon signage. The environment transitions from the highway underpass to a more commercial district with street-level shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial canyon with towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead between the towering skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense neon-lit canyon of the city center, surrounded by crowds and towering skyscrapers with heavy corporate advertising

notable_agents.action: woman in bright green shorts walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades and heavy neon advertising stretching into the haze
white paper lanterns with japanese characters hanging over the street
street food vendor stall with steam rising and neon lighting
curved elevated highway structure crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the densest part of the city, with towering corporate skyscrapers filling the horizon and traditional paper lanterns hanging above the street. The character walks through heavy pedestrian traffic past food market stalls and under curved highway ramps. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the buildings, emphasizing the vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a claustrophobic industrial stairwell into the sprawling, neon-drenched density of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a narrow concrete stairwell illuminated by a blue neon noodle sign, climbing past rusted railings and air conditioning units until pink lights emerge at the top. As the character emerges, the space opens abruptly into a wide, hazy intersection dominated by a massive pink hotel sign and towering buildings draped in wiring. The scene then shifts into a semi-enclosed corridor beneath an elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered walls and a distant Kiroshi Optics billboard before turning around a commercial corner marked by a digital samurai display. Finally, the environment expands into the city's densest core, where the camera moves through crowded market stalls and under curved highway ramps toward a horizon of corporate skyscrapers and flying vehicles.
